agent_summaries.performance: Performance analysis: Found 2 issues (1 medium, 1 low)

priority_issues.description: The password hashing mechanism using SHA-256 is not considered secure for storing passwords.
priority_issues.recommendation: Use a more secure password hashing algorithm like bcrypt or Argon2.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: Validation logic for username, email, and password involves unnecessary string operations and hashing.
priority_issues.recommendation: Optimize string operations and hashing to reduce unnecessary complexity.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: The User class constructor is doing too much by handling validation, hashing, logging setup, cache initialization, and connecting to a service.
priority_issues.recommendation: Refactor the User class constructor to delegate responsibilities to separate methods or classes following the Single Responsibility Principle.
priority_issues.action: Fix soon, can merge with tracking issue

priority_issues.description: Each user object initializes an empty cache unnecessarily.
priority_issues.recommendation: Consider lazy initialization of cache or only create cache when needed.
